hooks.command:
PROGRESS="/Users/admin/Learning/front-end/testing/practical-testing/PROGRESS.md"; MEMORY="/Users/admin/.claude/projects/-Users-admin-Learning-front-end-testing-practical-testing/memory/session_progress.md"; content=""; [ -f "$PROGRESS" ] && content+="=== PROGRESS.md ===
$(cat "$PROGRESS")"; [ -f "$MEMORY" ] && content+="

=== Session Memory ===
$(cat "$MEMORY")"; [ -n "$content" ] && printf '%s' "$content" | jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":.}}' || echo '{}'
echo '{"systemMessage":"Session ended. If you completed work today, update PROGRESS.md and session memory — tell Claude: wrap up this session."}'
